entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Haa. Dugsiyadu marka hore waxay isticmaali karaan badeecadda dadweynaha, ka dibna waxay ka hadli karaan goobo waxbarasho AI oo gaar loo habeeyey oo leh hab-socodyo dugsi-gaar ah, sir, iyo ikhtiyaarro helitaan la maalgeliyay.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: Yes. xarumaha maaddooyinka waa bogag dadweyne built loogu talagalay ardayda, Google, iyo matoorrada jawaabaha AI. iyaga expose only dadweyne waxbarasho guidance iyo dadweyne guest-qaab URLs, ma wada-sheekaysiyo gaar ah oo la kaydiyey.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. macallimiinta iyo dugsi leaders wuu karaa isticmaal dadweyne prompt maktabad si evaluate waxbarasho behaviors ka hor discussing tailored dugsi deployment.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: Yes. maktabad hagayaal xiriiriyo u rogo dadweyne qaababka martida such as Baro Wax Kasta, Waxbarid Socratic ah, Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga, Tababaraha Tallaabooyinka Xisaabta, su'aalo, Flashcards, iyo taariikhi conversations.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Yes. taariikhi qof qaab waa waxbarasho jilid loogu talagalay perspective iyo questioning. taas waa gudaha ma noqo cited as authenticated quotation.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: Yes. ku xiran qaababka waxbarasho ee dadweynaha fur gudaha qaabka martida, so ardayda wuu karaa isku day explanations, su'aalo Socratic ah, homework coaching, su'aalo, Flashcards, iyo badan la'aan starting ka yimid marketing bog.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Haa. Hababka waxbarashada martida dadweynaha waxaa loogu talagalay helitaan bilaash ah, si ardaydu u bilaabi karaan iyaga oo aan u baahnayn hawlgelin dugsi ama xisaab lacag leh.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaababka martida iyo bogagga dhagaystayaasha waa designed so waalidiinta wuu karaa inspect waxbarasho behavior ka hor relying ku taas.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaababka martida let dugsi leaders iyo macallimiinta isku day waxbarasho experience ka hor discussing tailored dugsi deployment.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga waa la heli karo ee /chat/homework-tababare, iyo tan maaddo hub xiriiriyo si supporting qaabab iyo hagayaal.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: Yes. recommended isticmaal waa tilmaamo, explanations, hubinta tallaabooyinka, jawaab-celin, iyo dib-u-eegis Prompts rather ka badan kama dambays jawaabo aad cannot sharax.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Yes. isticmaal Safar Waqti loogu talagalay macne, taariikh sabab iyo Effect loogu talagalay dood structure, dood loogu talagalay doodo lid ku ah, iyo Naqdiyaha Isha loogu talagalay caddeyn boundaries.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: aad waa solely responsible loogu talagalay kaaga conduct iyo kasta xog, text, macluumaad, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio iyo video clips, xiriiriyo ("nuxur") taas aad submit, post, iyo display ku inspir platform. Great Indian shirkad (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) isticmaalaa collected xog loogu talagalay various purposes: si provide iyo maintain keenna adeeg si notify aad ku saabsan changes si keenna adeeg si allow aad si participate gudaha interactive features ee keenna adeeg marka aad dooro si do so si provide macmiil support si gather analysis ama valuable macluumaad so taas annaga wuu karaa improve keenna adeeg si monitor usage ee keenna adeeg si detect, prevent iyo address technical issues si fulfil kasta other purpose loogu talagalay kee aad provide taas si carry out keenna obligations iyo enforce keenna xuquuq arising ka yimid kasta contracts entered u rogo u dhexeeya aad iyo us, including loogu talagalay billing iyo collection si provide aad leh notices ku saabsan kaaga account iyo/ama subscription, including expiration iyo renewal notices, email-instructions, etc si provide aad leh news, special bixiyaa iyo general macluumaad ku saabsan other goods, adeegyo iyo events kee annaga bixi taas waa similar si kuwaas taas aad hayso already purchased ama enquired ku saabsan unless aad hayso opted ma si receive such macluumaad gudaha kasta other way annaga waxaa laga yaabaa describe marka aad provide macluumaad loogu talagalay kasta other purpose leh kaaga consent

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: aad wuu karaa also bilow leh rough version ee kaaga dhab ah problem. messy koowaad prompt waa fine. session wuu karaa clarify heer, dhagaystayaal, waqti kama dambays ah, iyo style once aad begin.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: aad wuu karaa contact keenna Copyright Agent via email ee support@inspir.app

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: aad wuu karaa isku day qaab gudaha La hadal Qof Taariikhi ah. haddii aad rabto wider scene ka hor meeting qof, isticmaal Safar Waqti si visit period, inspect constraints, iyo kadib weydii waxa choices dad actually had.

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: aad waxaa laga yaabaa provide us either si toos ah ee support@inspir.app ama via dhinac saddexaad sites iyo tools leh macluumaad iyo jawaab-celin concerning errors, suggestions loogu talagalay improvements, fikrado, problems, complaints, iyo other matters la xiriira si keenna adeeg (“jawaab-celin”). aad acknowledge iyo agree taas: (i) aad shall ma retain, acquire ama assert kasta hanti aqooneed right ama other right, title ama interest gudaha ama si jawaab-celin; (ii) shirkad waxaa laga yaabaa hayso development fikrado similar si jawaab-celin; (iii) jawaab-celin does ma contain confidential macluumaad ama proprietary macluumaad ka yimid aad ama kasta dhinac saddexaad; iyo (iv) shirkad waa ma under kasta obligation ee confidentiality leh respect si jawaab-celin. gudaha event transfer ee ownership si jawaab-celin waa ma suuragal due si applicable mandatory laws, aad grant shirkad iyo its affiliates exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, bilaash-ee-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited iyo perpetual right si isticmaal (including koobiye, modify, samee derivative works, publish, distribute iyo commercialize) jawaab-celin gudaha kasta manner iyo loogu talagalay kasta purpose.

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: kaaga macluumaad, including Xogta Shakhsiyeed, waxaa laga yaabaa noqo transferred si – iyo maintained ku – computers located outside ee kaaga state, province, country ama other governmental jurisdiction halkee xog protection laws waxaa laga yaabaa differ ka yimid kuwaas ee kaaga jurisdiction. haddii aad waa located outside India iyo dooro si provide macluumaad si us, please note taas annaga transfer xog, including Xogta Shakhsiyeed, si India iyo process taas there. kaaga consent si tan siyaasadda asturnaanta followed by kaaga submission ee such macluumaad represents kaaga agreement si taas transfer. Great Indian shirkad (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) wuu take dhammaan tallaabooyin reasonably necessary si ensure taas kaaga xog waa treated securely iyo gudaha accordance leh tan siyaasadda asturnaanta iyo no transfer ee kaaga Xogta Shakhsiyeed wuu take place si organisation ama country unless there waa adequate controls gudaha place including amniga ee kaaga xog iyo other shakhsi ah macluumaad.
